title: Plugin Update
objective: Install a managed external plugin and run OpenClaw plugin update paths to verify tracked plugin metadata and dry-run update diagnostics.

phases.title: Install Managed Plugin
phases.intent: Create a tracked plugin install record for update checks.

phases.title: Update Plugin Metadata
phases.intent: Run individual and all-plugin update dry-runs so OpenClaw reports update plans without mutating the fixture.

phases.title: Post-Update Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway is still usable after update planning.
